title: Python Execution, Tools, and Evidence · Runtime Lens: Python Editor Terminal
summary: Build and diagnose a small command-line learning log across REPL, script, editor, and terminal workflows. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python editor terminal increment in a reproducible command-line learning log. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use an editor, terminal, working directory, and command history without losing file or environment context.
Read syntax errors and tracebacks from the final exception back to the relevant source cause.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
